# zergcore.dev

> Professional portfolio and AI-powered job application platform.

## What this site is
A full-stack portfolio CMS with integrated job-finding tools. It showcases
projects, blog posts, education, and work experience in English and Spanish.

## Key features
- Bilingual content (EN/ES) with automatic locale detection
- AI-generated tailored CVs and cover letters per job posting
- Job pipeline management with ATS integrations (Greenhouse, Lever, Ashby, etc.)
- Browser extension for assisted job application form filling
- MCP server for programmatic access to job data

## Tech stack
- Frontend: Next.js 15, React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS
- Backend: FastAPI, SQLAlchemy 2, PostgreSQL, Pydantic AI
- AI providers: Google Gemini, Groq

## Contact
Use the contact form at /en/contact or /es/contact.
